title: Batch 7 Zenith macOS Capsule Standard

requirements.description: The source_module_manifest must exact-copy non-secret Swift source bodies and tests from apps/zenith-macos.
The organ must run or record the original apps/zenith-macos swift test witness and keep stdout/stderr bodies out of receipts.
Negative fixtures must cover web latch, shutdown command gate, recording telemetry snake-case encoding, and missing SwiftPM witness.
Swift files with private path markers must not be copied into the public bundle until generalized upstream.
The capsule must deny app launch, provider/browser, source mutation, operator-thread, release, and semantic truth authority.

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)
validation_rules: validate required source refs or target refs remain public-safe
preserve draft/staged status until an active v2 acceptance lane supplies validator and receipt evidence
reject release, provider dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, and whole-system correctness claims

required_reentry: land an accepted organ or mechanism subject for batch7_zenith_macos_capsule before treating used_by_organs as support
claim the Batch7 Zenith macOS organ, standard, registry, capsule, and aggregate projection surfaces only under the admitting owner lane
run validator.microcosm.organs.batch7_zenith_macos_capsule plus the focused Batch7 Zenith macOS pytest and exact-copy checks
record receipt_contract evidence with validator result, original SwiftPM witness, authority ceiling, anti-claim, and body-in-receipt boundary
refresh aggregate doctrine-lattice projections only after source admission is landed and the aggregate owner claim is clean
non_laundering_rules: registered validator id is not active v2 standard support
draft used_by_organs entry is residual pressure until the target organ is accepted current authority
original SwiftPM witness requirement is not app launch, release, provider dispatch, or private-root equivalence authority
receipt_contract.required remains false while receipt_id is null
activation_boundary.claim_ceiling: draft inventory standard pressure only, not active public runtime standard, accepted organ, app launch, release approval, provider dispatch, or whole-system correctness

receipt_expectations: record validator command and result when an admitting validator exists
do not place source bodies, private paths, credentials, provider payloads, or operator thread content in receipts
anti_claim: The Batch7 zenith macos capsule standard is registered as draft inventory only; this does not authorize release, provider dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, active v2 acceptance, or whole-system correctness.

author.purpose: create a valid Batch7 zenith macos capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch7 zenith macos capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch7_zenith_macos_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

doctrine_kind_envelope.claim_ceiling: inventory and standard-shape visibility only, not active v2 acceptance
